notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.4. It addresses 16 CVEs: CVE-2022-48804, CVE-2022-49788, CVE-2023-52606, CVE-2023-52933, CVE-2025-21727, and 11 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
